label: P&L Time Series
description: Stacked area chart of ten P&L factors over time with live and batch mode comparison.

0.6.note: — added isLoading skeleton (Skeleton import + early-return guard before empty-state check).

0.7.note: Empty guard: timeSeriesData.length === 0 && backtestVsLive.length === 0 returns 'No P&L time series data available'.

l0.notes: 0.1 ✓ WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2 ✓ requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 ✓ availableOn: [pnl]. 0.4 ✓ No any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 ✓ No direct lib/mocks imports. 0.6 FIXED — added isLoading skeleton (Skeleton import + early-return guard before empty-state check). 0.7 ✓ Empty guard: timeSeriesData.length === 0 && backtestVsLive.length === 0 returns 'No P&L time series data available'. 0.8 ✓ Error handled at PnLDataProvider level. 0.9 ✓ No dead code.

1.1.note: timeSeriesData, timeSeriesNetPnL, backtestVsLive all from usePnLData().

1.3.note: filterMultiplier reacts to selectedOrgIds from global scope — timeSeriesData is re-derived on change.

1.7.note: PNL_FACTOR_CHART_COLORS from lib/config/services/pnl.config; FACTORS inline constant (not from mocks).

l1.notes: 1.1 ✓ timeSeriesData, timeSeriesNetPnL, backtestVsLive all from usePnLData(). 1.2 ✓ Context reads useGlobalScope(). 1.3 ✓ filterMultiplier reacts to selectedOrgIds from global scope — timeSeriesData is re-derived on change. 1.4 ✓ selectedClientIds cascade wired in context. 1.5 ✓ selectedStrategyIds wired in context. 1.6 ✓ Empty scope arrays → filterMultiplier=1 → unfiltered. 1.7 ✓ PNL_FACTOR_CHART_COLORS from lib/config/services/pnl.config; FACTORS inline constant (not from mocks).

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

findings: L0 — 0.6 FAILED (no isLoading handling). Fixed: added Skeleton import and isLoading early-return skeleton above the existing empty-state check. 8 of 9 checks already passed.
L1 — All 7 checks passed. timeSeriesData reactive to filterMultiplier which reads org/client/strategy scope from global store.
